credentials_path.description: Google OAuth client credentials JSON path. Download from Google Cloud Console OAuth client.
credentials_path.hint: 建议填写绝对路径，例如 /home/jing/.config/astrbot/google_oauth_client.json

calendar_id.description: Google Calendar ID used when creating events.

tasklist_id.description: Google Tasks tasklist ID used when creating tasks.

default_timezone.description: Default timezone for date/time fields without timezone.

default_event_duration_minutes.description: Default event duration when end time is missing.
default_event_duration_minutes.hint: LLM 工具未提供结束时间时使用。

enable_command_fallback.description: Enable command wrappers /gcal_event and /gtask_create using simple JSON arguments.
enable_command_fallback.hint: LLM tool 是主要入口；命令用于测试。

auth_port.description: Fixed local OAuth callback port for SSH tunnel authorization.
auth_port.hint: 远程 CLI 推荐固定端口，例如 8765；本地电脑执行 ssh -L 8765:127.0.0.1:8765 user@server。

auth_timeout_seconds.description: OAuth callback listener timeout in seconds.
auth_timeout_seconds.hint: 授权 URL 有效等待时间。

auth_ssh_target.hint: 例如 jing@your-server 或 user@1.2.3.4；留空则用 user@hostname 作为提示。
